personalInfo.summary: Motivated third-year Computer Science student seeking internship or project opportunities to expand technical skills and contribute to impactful engineering teams. I have a solid foundation in C, C++ and Java. Hard-working, detail-oriented, and eager to learn.

education.institution: The Academic College of Tel Aviv–Yaffo
education.description: Gaining hands-on experience in software development with a focus on writing efficient, maintainable code. Completed coursework in Programming Languages (C, C++, Java, JavaScript), Data Structures, and Algorithms. Developed and managed multiple coding projects using Git and GitHub. Programmed in Linux environments, wrote Bash scripts for task automation and system interaction, and gained hands-on experience working with Docker and VMware. Practiced problem-solving techniques through algorithm challenges and academic projects.
Graduated with honors. Completed 5 units in English and 4 units in Mathematics.

experience.description: Prepared financial reports and organized tax documentation. Strengthened attention to detail, analytical thinking, and time management.
Supported investigations through intelligence gathering and data analysis. Processed classified information with accuracy and confidentiality.

projects.title: DonkeyKong
projects.description: Developed an old-school DonkeyKong-style game as a final project using C++ and object-oriented design principles.

projects.title: S-Emulator
projects.description: Developing an S-Emulator in Java with emphasis on emulator engine implementation, XML parsing/validation, and GUI integration using JavaFX.

strengths: Clear listing of relevant programming languages and tools such as C, C++, Java, Docker, and Git.
Education section includes detailed coursework and practical experience with technologies like Docker and Bash scripting.
Projects demonstrate application of programming skills in C++ and Java with specific technologies mentioned.
Experience descriptions highlight transferable skills such as attention to detail, analytical thinking, and confidentiality.

suggestions.issue: Summary is generic and lacks impact-oriented wording or quantifiable achievements.
suggestions.fix: Rewrite the summary to include strong action verbs and specific accomplishments or goals, e.g., 'Developed X projects using C++ improving Y by Z%.'

suggestions.issue: Experience descriptions are vague and lack quantifiable results or clear impact.
suggestions.fix: Enhance each experience entry by adding specific achievements, metrics, or outcomes, e.g., 'Prepared 50+ financial reports monthly, reducing errors by 15%.'

suggestions.issue: Project descriptions are brief and do not quantify impact or challenges solved.
suggestions.fix: Expand project descriptions to include measurable results, challenges overcome, or user impact, e.g., 'Implemented game mechanics improving user engagement by X%.'

suggestions.issue: Skills list mixes soft skills and technical skills without differentiation or proficiency levels.
suggestions.fix: Separate technical and soft skills, and consider adding proficiency levels or experience context to strengthen the skills section.
